known_limitations: Release replay JSON is metadata-only and records replay status without embedding QA logs or raw runtime artifacts
Failures still exit nonzero rather than emitting a successful replay JSON object
Skipped QA is recorded as skipped and is not equivalent to full replay
Atlas production status is a local contract, not deployment certification
